SEC-002

HOME LAB & PRACTICE

↗ VIEW ON GITHUB
LAB ENVIRONMENT
Personal Splunk Enterprise installation on Windows — ingesting real Security, System, PowerShell, Firewall and DNS logs. Custom dashboards, SPL correlation rules and automated alerts replicating enterprise SOC workflows.
All attacks simulated on own machine, then investigated in Splunk exactly as a real SOC analyst would — from raw event to full written incident report.
Tools: Splunk Enterprise · Windows Event Logs · PowerShell Operational Logs · Windows Firewall Logs · DNS Client Logs · MITRE ATT&CK Framework.
INVESTIGATIONS COMPLETED — 16 / 16

KEY DETECTION HIGHLIGHTS
Brute Force → Success Chain (Lab 16): Correlated 18 failed logins (4625) + 12 successful logins (4624) for account hp — flagged as HIGH risk possible successful brute force.
Backdoor Admin Account (Lab 16): Detected hacker account created (4720) then immediately added to Administrators group (4732) — CRITICAL escalation chain.
Evidence Destruction (Lab 16): Correlated 18 failed logins + 3 log clearing events (1102) — attacker cleared audit trail post-attack. "The audit log was cleared" confirmed.
Malicious Service (Lab 11): Detected FakeService installed with binary cmd.exe /c whoami — auto-start as LocalSystem via Event ID 7045.
Port Scan (Lab 12): 1,527 firewall events analysed — port scan from 127.0.0.1 across 1,024 ports confirmed. Built custom regex field extraction in SPL.
DNS C2 (Lab 13): 853 DNS events analysed — detected suspicious query to suspicious-domain.xyz mapped to T1071.004 (C2 over DNS).
SPL SKILLS & DASHBOARD METRICS
SPL techniques used: stats, eval, where, rex (regex field extraction), search, table, sort, head — including multi-event correlation across sourcetypes in a single query.
SOC Dashboard (Lab 14): Built 8-panel live dashboard — Failed Logins (38), New Users (4), Log Clears (2), Privilege Escalations (10), Malicious Services (16), Lockouts (1), PowerShell Events (679), Suspicious PS Commands (32).
Splunk Alerts (Lab 15): Configured 5 production-grade alerts — Brute Force, Log Clearing, New User, Privilege Escalation, Malicious Service. Brute Force alert triggered 6 times confirming automated detection works.
All 16 investigations documented — full written incident reports, SPL queries, screenshots and MITRE ATT&CK mappings saved in GitHub repository.
SEC-003

DEPLOYED TOOLS

OPERATION // RAKSHAK-SOC
Browser-Based SIEM Dashboard
SIEM

A fully functional SOC analyst simulation dashboard — no framework, pure JS — replicating real enterprise SOC workflows with TP/FP verdicts, MITRE kill-chain visualisation, and analyst report export.

  • 15 MITRE ATT&CK technique mappings across 7-day APT simulation
  • Brute-force correlation rules & port-scan pattern detection
  • Live log ingestion: JSON / NDJSON / CSV / TXT drag-and-drop
  • KPI dashboard with severity donuts & daily threat-trend view
Vanilla JS ES2022 CSS Custom Props Node.js / Express Vercel MITRE ATT&CK
⌥ GitHub ▶ Live Demo
OPERATION // RAKSHAK-EMAIL
AI Email Threat Intelligence
THREAT INTEL

SOC-grade phishing detection integrating AI (Gemini/Mistral via OpenRouter), VirusTotal API, and MITRE ATT&CK mapping. Produces a 0–100 threat score with a Legitimate / Suspicious / Phishing verdict.

  • Multi-dimensional scoring: Sender (22%), Links (22%), Content (20%), Headers (18%), Urgency (18%)
  • SPF / DKIM / DMARC parsing with full header forensics
  • Screenshot OCR, PDF scan, email text & URL checking
  • 5-key OpenRouter auto-rotation for uninterrupted AI availability
Node.js Express VirusTotal API v3 OpenRouter API Gemini / Mistral Vercel
⌥ GitHub ▶ Live Demo
OPERATION // BVS-V2
Blockchain Voting System
BLOCKCHAIN

Decentralised, tamper-proof voting on Ethereum Sepolia Testnet. Contributed to smart contract architecture and front-end dashboard. Demonstrates security-first design applied beyond the SOC domain.

  • Solidity VotingFactory with on-chain candidate/voter registration
  • MetaMask wallet integration with live election countdown
  • Animated results dashboard with real-time bar-chart breakdown
React 18 Vite Ethers.js v6 Solidity Ethereum Sepolia
⌥ GitHub ▶ Live Demo
